meta.title: SnowPuri — Web experiences made with care
meta.description: SnowPuri is a digital studio building a diverse portfolio of web services.

hero.title:
A new service,
every day.
hero.subtitle: SnowPuri builds web experiences made with care.

manifesto.title: What we believe
manifesto.quote: Together with artificial intelligence, we are changing many things in the world.

items.p: We deliver real value to people's daily lives.
We turn complex technology into simple experiences.
We grow small services patiently and for the long term.
Repetitive tasks to tools, people to better work.
Users, partners, team — we go further when we build together.

roadmap.title: Coming soon
roadmap.subtitle: The next things we're working on at SnowPuri. We'll let you know first when they ship.

contact.title: Want to build together?
contact.subtitle: Collaborations, partnerships, and careers — all welcome.
contact.message_ph: What would you like to talk about?
